channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Nation's Growing Influence in South Australia Signals Major Political Shift
item.description: The 2026 South Australian state election results have revealed a major shift in the political landscape, with One Nation making significant inroads into traditionally strong Liberal areas. As the vote...

item.title: Sound-Levitated Time Crystal Demonstrates Nonreciprocal Particle Interactions
item.description: Researchers at New York University have developed a novel type of time crystal using sound waves to levitate tiny styrofoam beads. Unlike traditional systems that adhere to Newton's Third Law of Motio...

item.title: Quebec investors convert church into pickleball court to preserve community space
item.description: In Quebec, three local investors have launched a unique project to give new life to the province’s many empty churches by converting one of them into a pickleball court. Their idea aims to attract new...

item.title: Foreign National Indicted for Alleged $90 Million Medicare Fraud in the U.S.
item.description: Anar Rustamov, a 38-year-old foreign national from Azerbaijan, has been indicted by a federal grand jury for allegedly participating in a $90 million Medicare Advantage fraud scheme. According to the ...

item.title: Kenya faces risk of losing 2027 Afcon hosting over delayed payment
item.description: Kenya is currently facing serious embarrassment over the delayed payment of $30 million (Sh3.9 billion) for the hosting rights of the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations, which it will co-host with Tanzania an...

item.title: Patriotic Alliance dismisses Parliament-linked drug claims against Gayton McKenzie
item.description: The Patriotic Alliance (PA) has strongly denied allegations linking its president, Gayton McKenzie, who also serves as South Africa’s Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture, to the drug trade. The accusa...

item.title: Imran Khan Receives Third Anti-VEGF Injection for Eye Condition at PIMS
item.description: Former Prime Minister Imran Khan underwent a third eye procedure at the Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (PIMS) on Monday, hospital authorities confirmed. The procedure involved an anti-VEGF inj...

item.title: London Knights Award Winners Announced, Playoff Series with Soo Greyhounds Looms
item.description: The London Knights concluded their regular season, marked by a league-record 17th time with 40 wins since 2000, and celebrated their accomplishments by holding their annual team awards ceremony on Mar...

item.title: Ondo police arrest 21-year-old for rape and murder of woman in Akoko North-East
item.description: Police for Ondo State don arrest one 21-year-old guy, Alabi Anthony, wey dem dey accuse of raping and killing Olaseni Veronica for Iboropa community, Akoko North-East LGA. According to DSP Abayomi Jim...

item.title: Nigeria launches unique learner ID system to monitor school enrolment and progress
item.description: The Nigerian government don announce plan to introduce one Learner Identification Number (LIN) wey go help track students from their primary school up to secondary level. Minister of Education, Tunji ...

item.title: Service Dog Dies After Attack at Gatineau Dog Daycare
item.description: A Gatineau chiropractor, Félix Lanthier, has spoken out after his golden retriever, Austin, was mauled to death at Kaninou, a local dog daycare. Lanthier left Austin at the daycare while he went on a ...

item.title: Man City Clinch Ninth Carabao Cup with O'Reilly's Double Against Arsenal
item.description: Manchester City secured their ninth Carabao Cup with a convincing 2-0 victory over Arsenal at Wembley Stadium on Sunday. The match saw 21-year-old fullback Nico O'Reilly steal the show, scoring twice ...

item.title: No. 1 seed Florida falls to Iowa as March Madness second round delivers buzzer‑beaters and upsets
item.description: Sunday’s slate of March Madness second‑round games delivered a wave of drama as the first No. 1 seed of the 2026 tournament fell and multiple teams booked their trips to the Sweet 16. In the men’s bra...

item.title: IG Disu orders fewer tactical teams to strengthen supervision and accountability
item.description: The Inspector General of Police, Olatunji Disu, don issue fresh directive wey go reduce the number of tactical teams for police formations across Nigeria. According to statement wey Force Public Relat...

item.title: Debate over rural mole-catching tradition sparks social media divide
item.description: A photograph of dead moles hanging from a fence in Cumbria has sparked a heated debate on social media over rural traditions and attitudes towards wildlife. Simon Lucas, a 61-year-old musician from Br...

item.title: Piyush Goyal to Hold Talks on Tamil Nadu Assembly Poll Seat-Sharing with State BJP Leaders
item.description: Union minister Piyush Goyal is set to arrive in Chennai on Monday to finalise the Bharatiya Janata Party’s (BJP) seat-sharing arrangements for the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections. BJP’s state p...

item.title: Transport groups to stage nationwide strike on March 26-27 due to high fuel prices
item.description: Several transport groups in the Philippines are planning a two-day strike from March 26 to 27, 2026, to protest the continuous rise in fuel prices. Public utility jeepneys (PUJs), transport network ve...

item.title: Government raises high-octane fuel levy to shift burden on wealthy consumers
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has announced a Rs200 per litre increase in the levy on high-octane fuel, raising the total to Rs300 per litre. The move targets luxury vehicle users and aims to shift th...

item.title: Amber Ray and Rapudo Impress with Smooth Dance Moves at Ya Levis' Private Event
item.description: Amber Ray and Kennedy Rapudo, the celebrity couple, recently stole the spotlight at an exclusive invite-only event at Villa Rosa Kempinski in Westlands. The event, which was a private celebration for ...

item.title: Government Implements Toll Fee Discount and Reduced MRT, LRT-2 Fares Starting Today
item.description: Starting March 23, 2026, the Department of Transportation (DOTr) has officially implemented toll fee discounts for selected expressways and lowered fares for Metro Manila’s main rail lines—the MRT-3 a...
